name: superbereza.md
description: Public skills for AI coding agents — Things 3, file/app sharing, remote-control, browser automation.

plugins.name: things
plugins.description: Read/write Things 3 tasks (inbox/today/projects, add/complete/update) — JSON output, CLI + agent skill

plugins.name: drop
plugins.description: Securely share any file, folder, or running app via a password-protected HTTPS link

plugins.name: claude-sessions-toolbox
plugins.description: Launch + persist Claude Code Remote Control / tmux sessions — claude-remote (spawn) + claude-keep (self-heal across reboots)

plugins.name: browser
plugins.description: Drive a real browser from a coding agent — a CLI over a persistent Playwright daemon, with compact clickable page snapshots

plugins.name: i-want-it-all
plugins.description: Umbrella — install all superbereza skills at once (things + drop + claude-remote)
